original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: United States Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
original_registry_entry.version: CDC Yellow Book: Health Information for International Travel, 2026 edition
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires UAE prescribing and travel-medicine adaptation
original_registry_entry.population: Travelers exposed to provocative motion, with age-, pregnancy-, vestibular-, migraine-, comorbidity- and medicine-specific qualifiers.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Pre-travel counselling and clinician assessment of symptoms consistent with motion sickness.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for symptom pattern, exposure, susceptibility and differential-assessment documentation; no medicine, dose, behavioural instruction or clinical action is mapped.

exact_sections.heading: Signs and symptoms; Individual susceptibility and risk factors
exact_sections.locator: official chapter sections “Signs and symptoms” and “Individual susceptibility and risk factors”
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording provocative motion, gradual symptom onset, nausea, vomiting, dizziness, pallor, sweating, drowsiness, headache, visual symptoms, age, pregnancy, migraine, vertigo and vestibular-history context without diagnosing automatically.

exact_sections.heading: Medical management of motion sickness — alternative-cause assessment
exact_sections.locator: official chapter section “Medical management of motion sickness”
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician documentation that peripheral and central vestibular alternatives and migraine context were considered; treatment, dosing and route content is excluded.

title: Motion Sickness
publisher: United States Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires UAE prescribing and travel-medicine adaptation
population: Travelers exposed to provocative motion, with age-, pregnancy-, vestibular-, migraine-, comorbidity- and medicine-specific qualifiers.
intended_setting: Pre-travel counselling and clinician assessment of symptoms consistent with motion sickness.
